name: Australian United Investment Company Limited
analysis: AUI's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 4% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.6× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$11.0000. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$11.0100, stop A$10.4148, target A$12.7956 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
